aids.title: Hash Table Complexity
aids.content:
Average case: O(1)
Worst case: O(n) - all keys collide

Keep load factor < 0.7 for O(1)

aids.title: Load Factor Formula
aids.content:
α = n / m

n = number of elements
m = table size

High α = many collisions = slow

aids.title: Hash Table = 3 Things
aids.content:
1. Array (storage)
2. Hash Function (key → index)
3. Collision Handler (when h(k1) = h(k2))
